---
name: Code Refactoring
about: Propose code structural improvements that don't change behavior or UI
title: "[REFACTOR] <Refactor Title>"
labels: refactor
assignees: ''
type: Task

---

**Target Codebase / Scope**
Specify the files, classes, or functions that require refactoring.

**Current Limitation / Technical Debt**
Explain what is wrong with the current code structure (e.g., duplicated code, hard-to-read logic, outdated syntax).

**Proposed Structural Changes**
Outline how the code should be reorganized or rewritten to improve health.

**Verification Plan**
How will we ensure that this change introduces zero functional regressions? (e.g., run existing unit tests, manual smoke test).
